purpose: Rules for selecting full static character cards and dynamic character memory for scene_contract.
load_full_character_memory_when: character is present, nearby, speaking, addressed, observing, or able to hear the scene
character is directly referenced by current scene goal
character must receive a state update because they witnessed/learned something
calendar current day explicitly makes this character active
do_not_load_full_character_memory_when: character is absent and only generally exists in canon
character is a future calendar event not yet active
character is not relevant to scene goal
only Akira POV is active and this character is not present/referenced
character is only mentioned as background name with no current relevance
knowledge_safety: Loaded cards and memory are internal for characterization, not automatic POV exposition.
If a character is not loaded, they do not learn the scene.
Do not use unloaded character memory to drive current NPC behavior.
Do not use calendar/rules as character knowledge.
Do not use hidden past as present knowledge unless the character has a valid source.

recommended_scene_contract_slice.protected_moments: only active moments relevant to current scene

load_past_yaml_only_when: scene directly touches the character past
flashback or memory trigger is active
another character speaks about that past with a valid source
current calendar slice or scene goal explicitly requires past context
do_not_use: short character summaries as behavior source
character_source_rule.reason: Short summaries flatten personality and make characters behave unlike their full cards.

scene_contract_character_slice_order: main.yaml: identity, role, appearance, short card_hint
character.yaml: voice, behavior, habits, combat style, energy behavior
knowledge.yaml: stable knowledge, ignorance and secrets known at scene start
state/character_memory/<id>.json: dynamic memory from previous scenes
past.yaml: conditional only, not always loaded
